user.title: Curb Update Server
user.description: Choose the address and port the update server will bind to. The server does not start automatically — use the **Curb Update Server** switch to start it when you want to deliver an update. It auto-stops after one hour as a safety. Make sure DNS is redirecting `updates.energycurb.com` to this Home Assistant instance and that the chosen port is reachable on the device's network.

abort.already_configured: Curb Update Server is already configured.

init.title: Curb Update Server
init.description: Change the bind address or port. The server will restart with the new settings.
